VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited — it is the well-known GPT-2 paper published on the OpenAI blog in 2019, with authors Alec Radford, Jeffrey Wu, Rewon Child, David Luan, Dario Amodei, and Ilya Sutskever, matching the reference metadata precisely. It is not found in traditional academic databases because it was published as an OpenAI blog/technical report, not in a journal or arXiv.
LINK: https://cdn.openai.com/better-language-models/language_models_are_unsupervised_multitask_learners.pdf
